mapper.select:
SELECT o.*, c.name AS customer_name, s.name AS stage_name, s.probability, u.real_name AS owner_name FROM crm_opportunity o LEFT JOIN crm_customer c ON o.customer_id = c.id AND c.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN crm_opportunity_stage s ON o.stage_id = s.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON o.owner_id = u.id
o.deleted_at IS NULL
AND (o.name LIKE '%' || #{keywords} || '%' OR c.name LIKE '%' || #{keywords} || '%')
AND o.stage_id = #{stageId} AND o.customer_id = #{customerId} AND o.owner_id = #{ownerId}
ORDER BY o.created_at DESC
